name: skills-collection
description: A curated collection of Claude Code skills for medical AI PhD research workflows

plugins.name: literature-and-topic-selection
plugins.description: Skills for research topic selection, literature review, and academic database search

plugins.name: data-preparation-and-processing
plugins.description: Skills for medical imaging, EHR data, physiological signals, and general data processing

plugins.name: model-development-and-experiments
plugins.description: Skills for deep learning, graph neural networks, explainability, time series, and dimensionality reduction

plugins.name: results-analysis-and-visualization
plugins.description: Skills for scientific visualization, statistical analysis, and interactive plotting

plugins.name: paper-writing-and-submission
plugins.description: Skills for academic writing, venue templates, peer review, and presentation materials
